text: Act Four. End of the school year.

The clubroom looks different now. New worm drawings on the string lights. Grubwin's clay figure has been carefully dusted. Someone added a small worm to the lineup — not Grubwin's work, nobody claims it. It appeared.
Everyone has exams coming. The world outside is performing end-of-year energy. In here it's slower and more certain.

speaker: Vermia
text: Last regular meeting of the year. I want to say something before Dirtus announces whatever he's announcing.

speaker: Dirtus
text: *from behind the door* I can hear you. I'm coming in thirty seconds.

speaker: Vermia
text: Quick then. You — [player]. You came here not knowing what any of this was. And you stayed. And you wrote poems. And you changed what this place is.

speaker: Vermia
text: I founded this club twice. And I think this was the year it actually became real. Because of you, and the Relay, and the greenhouse, and the worm, and the second hymn, and all of it.
The door opens. Dirtus enters. He has new slides. Of course.

speaker: Dirtus
text: SUMMER CONVERGENCE PLAN. Slides one through twelve.

options.label: Let's hear the summer plan. All twelve slides.
First — I want to say something to everyone.
